global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a product display and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale on a product with a call to action.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A light gray rectangular area at the top of the ad, providing a neutral backdrop.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area in the center featuring a placeholder for a product image with rounded corners.

elements.label: Main text area
elements.description: A large, bold text area in the center displaying the message about the next favorite pick.

elements.label: Additional text area
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main text, providing additional context about the offer.

elements.label: Secondary text area
elements.description: Another small text area positioned slightly to the left, likely for additional details.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with bold text inviting users to learn more.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Learn more

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo area at the top left featuring the text 'BoltCart' in a modern font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching text.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the product display is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
